title: Tonfy Showcases Precision Thermal Management Solutions at Nuclear Tech Conference
description: Tonfy presents its nuclear-focused thermal management solutions at the 2025 International Conference on Nuclear Technology Applications, unlocking trillion-yuan market opportunities.

title: Tonfy Debuts at DCW Singapore with Record-Breaking 2.6MW Cabinet CDU and 150kW Rack CDU
description: Tonfy showcases its full portfolio of data center thermal management solutions at DCW Singapore, unveiling the new 2.6MW Cabinet CDU and 150kW Rack CDU to meet high-density compute demands.

title: Tonfy Shines at EMO Hannover 2025 with Cutting-Edge Thermal Management Solutions
description: Tonfy makes a striking impact with its advanced thermal management solutions at the EMO Hannover International European Machine Tool Exhibition, showcasing innovation on the international stage.

title: Tonfy Takes Center Stage on the International Energy Stage at RE+, Driving a Greener Future
description: Tonfy showcases a wide range of thermal management products and system solutions at the RE+ International Solar & Photovoltaic Expo, highlighting its technological strength in the green energy sector.

title: Tonfy Powers the Future of Energy Storage with Innovative Thermal Management at EESA 2025
description: Tonfy presents a full range of award-winning energy storage thermal management products at the 4th EESA Energy Storage Expo in Shanghai.

title: AMADA Visits Tonfy: Strengthening Partnership and Driving Innovation
description: Tonfy recently welcomed a delegation from AMADA to exchange insights and strengthen long-term collaboration in intelligent manufacturing and advanced temperature control solutions.

title: TONFY Honored as CATL Annual Excellent Supplier, Jointly Creating a New Era
description: TONFY is awarded the '2023 Annual Excellent Supplier' by CATL, recognizing its high-quality temperature control solutions and outstanding contributions to the new energy storage sector.

title: TONFY Awarded 2024 "Strategic Partner" by Sungrow, Joining Forces for a Green Future
description: TONFY has been honored with the 2024 'Strategic Partner' award by Sungrow, recognizing its outstanding performance and solidifying a deep, long-term collaboration for a sustainable future.

title: TONFY Participates in Drafting the Group Standard for Energy Storage Cooling Systems
description: TONFY solidifies its influence in the energy storage industry by participating in the drafting of the officially released group standard for multi-level cooling systems of energy storage stations.

title: TONFY Launches All-New Mate Cool Laser Water Chiller
description: TONFY introduces the Mate Cool laser water chiller, featuring a comprehensive structural upgrade, zero water leakage risk, and high-precision temperature control for high-performance lasers.

title: TONFY Invites You to Explore the New Era of Machine Tool Temperature Control at TIMTOS 2025
description: TONFY shines at the TIMTOS 2025 Taipei International Machine Tool Show, showcasing its full range of core variable frequency chillers with ±0.02℃ precision.

title: Craftsmanship for the Future | TONFY Debuts at Taipei Machine Tool Show with Comprehensive Upgrades
description: As TIMTOS 2025 draws to a close, TONFY makes a stunning appearance with a variety of new environmentally friendly refrigerant products and high-precision variable frequency solutions.

title: Craftsmanship Dancing Together · Intelligence Leading the Way | TONFY & TMTS 2024
description: TONFY demonstrates high-precision and high-reliable temperature control solutions with its industry-leading product lineup at the TMTS 2024 Taiwan International Machine Tool Show.

title: TONFY at SIMTOS 2024: Advancing Industrial Temperature Control
description: At SIMTOS 2024 in Seoul, TONFY demonstrated its strong capabilities in industrial temperature control and innovative thermal management solutions for the global manufacturing stage.

title: TONFY Liquid Cooling Units Empower High-Quality Development of “China Chip”
description: TONFY develops high-precision fluorinated liquid cooling units with ±0.02°C accuracy, injecting innovative thermal management capabilities into the semiconductor manufacturing industry.

title: TONFY Showcases Advanced Thermal Management Solutions at ees Europe 2024 in Munich
description: As a leading Chinese manufacturer, TONFY presents its air-cooled and liquid-cooled energy storage thermal management solutions at ees Europe 2024 in Munich.

title: Gratitude for Partnership: TONFY ATF Stuttgart Appreciation Dinner
description: TONFY’s German subsidiary ATF hosted an appreciation dinner at the Stuttgart TV Tower, celebrating over a decade of partnership with leading European enterprises.

title: Innovation Leads the Future: New PCS Liquid-Cooling Solution—Guardian of Energy Storage System Safety
description: TONFY achieves a significant breakthrough with its PCS-specific liquid-cooling solution, offering superior environmental adaptability and safety for large-scale energy storage systems.

title: Exhibition Highlights: TONFY Shines at RE+ 2024 in the United States
description: TONFY showcases its latest advancements in energy storage thermal management at RE+ 2024 in California, strengthening partnerships for a global green energy future.

title: TONFY Empowers the Future of Energy Storage with Innovative Thermal Management at EESA
description: TONFY sweeps the EESA Starlight Awards in Shanghai, showcasing centralized, immersion, and direct-cooling solutions that redefine energy storage efficiency and safety.

title: Exhibition Highlights: TONFY Shines at AMB 2024 in Stuttgart
description: Together with its German subsidiary ATF, TONFY showcases F-gas compliant, eco-friendly thermal management solutions at the Stuttgart Metalworking Exhibition.

title: TONFY Strengthens Partnership with Japan’s Amada to Co-Create the Future
description: TONFY is recognized as a 'Model Factory for Sheet Metal Smart Manufacturing' by Amada, solidifying a strategic partnership for high-precision manufacturing.

title: Exhibition Highlights: TONFY Impresses at the 12th BUTECH in Busan, South Korea
description: TONFY showcases flagship industrial thermal management products at BUTECH 2024, strengthening its international brand presence in the East Asian machinery market.

title: TONFY Showcases Advanced Thermal Management Solutions at EMO Hannover 2023
description: Celebrating a decade on the international stage, TONFY and its German subsidiary ATF present intelligent cooling technologies at EMO Hannover, the world's leading machine tool exhibition.

title: Safeguarding Energy Security: TONFY’s Liquid-Cooling Solution Exceeds 2 GWh Installed Capacity
description: TONFY achieves a major milestone as its liquid-cooling solution for high-voltage cascaded energy storage systems surpasses 2 GWh in total installed capacity worldwide.

title: Exhibition Highlights: TONFY at WIN Eurasia—Shaping the Future of Eurasian Industry
description: TONFY leverages Türkiye’s strategic position at WIN Eurasia to showcase thermal management solutions for industrial automation, energy technology, and green manufacturing.

title: Thermal Management Empowering the Hydrogen Era: TONFY Supporting Hydrogen Development
description: TONFY provides full-chain thermal management for hydrogen production, storage, and fuel cells, including support for China's first megawatt-level AEM water electrolysis system.

title: Exhibition Highlights: TONFY Shines at EURO BLECH 2024 in Hannover
description: TONFY and its subsidiary ATF showcase innovative thermal management for sheet metal processing at EURO BLECH 2024, with products featured across multiple global exhibitors' equipment.

title: Featured in People’s Daily: TONFY Shines at Frankfurt Technology Fair
description: Reported by People's Daily, TONFY makes its first major appearance in the overseas data center sector at the Frankfurt Technology Fair, showcasing advanced cooling for AI and Cloud computing.

title: TONFY Industry Report: 2023 New Energy Storage Sector Overview
description: TONFY highlights a year of achievement in new energy storage, featuring major application cases, industry recognition, and advancements in digitalized lean manufacturing.

title: New Product Launch: SWW Series Next-Generation Water-Cooled Chiller for the Semiconductor Industry
description: TONFY unveils the SWW Series chiller, providing ±0.3°C precision and SEMI-standard compliance for semiconductor thin-film deposition and multi-stage manufacturing.

title: TONFY’s German Subsidiary ATF Accompanies General Technology Group Machine Tool Leadership to VDW, Germany
description: ATF Cooling GmbH facilitates high-level strategic talks between China's national machine tool team and the German Machine Tool Builders’ Association (VDW) in Frankfurt.

title: TONFY: Innovative Dual-Channel Water Chiller for Semiconductor Thinning Processes
description: TONFY launches a dual-channel water chiller with ±0.1°C precision and copper-free design, specifically optimized for high-purity semiconductor grinding and thinning processes.

title: TONFY Advances Liquid Cooling Overseas: Discussing Innovation and “Double Zero Action” at Hong Kong Asia Data Center Summit
description: At the Asia Data Center Summit in Hong Kong, TONFY shares insights on liquid cooling deployment, material compatibility, and the 'Double Zero Action' for high-efficiency data centers.
